_meta.notes: Federal 25C credit expired Dec 31 2025 (OBBBA). State and utility rebates are now the only stack.

evt_income_eligible.name: Efficiency Vermont income-eligible weatherization
evt_income_eligible.eligibility: Households at or below specified AMI thresholds (varies by county and household size)

diy_rebate.name: Efficiency Vermont DIY weatherization rebate
diy_rebate.eligibility: All VT households doing DIY weatherstripping/air sealing

home_repair_program.name: Home Repair Program (for weatherization prep)
home_repair_program.eligibility: Low/moderate-income households with a pending weatherization project. Covers roof, plumbing, foundation, asbestos/vermiculite/mold remediation needed before weatherization.
home_repair_program.expires: subject to ARPA and ongoing funding

wrap_loan.name: Weatherization Repayment Assistance Program (WRAP) loan
wrap_loan.eligibility: Pay through utility bill; low/mod-income borrow interest-free with 5-year term

evt_ductless.name: EVT ductless mini-split rebate
evt_ductless.eligibility: All VT households with EVT-network installer

evt_ducted.name: EVT ducted heat pump rebate
evt_ducted.eligibility: All VT households with EVT-network installer

gmp_income_bonus.name: GMP heat pump income bonus
gmp_income_bonus.eligibility: GMP customers at or below 80% AMI

vppsa_income_bonus.name: VPPSA heat pump income bonus
vppsa_income_bonus.eligibility: VPPSA-member-utility customers at or below 80% AMI

section_25c.name: Federal 25C Energy Efficient Home Improvement Credit

ami_thresholds_2026._notes: 80% AMI thresholds used for income-eligibility on most VT energy programs. Source: HUD 2026 income limits.
